ItacPersonItem.Notes: Angelo Spannocchi informs Bulgarini on the Travagliati meetings. These include verses that are introduced and edited, lessons are followed by discussions, and people can attend even if they are not part of the Academy. Similar meetings take place in the Intronati and Accesi Academies. See Ricco` 1989.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
